nasb.text: and the earth opened its mouth and swallowed them up along with Korah, when that company died, when the fire devoured 250 men, so that they became a warning.

esv.text: and the earth opened its mouth and swallowed them up together with Korah, when that company died, when the fire devoured 250 men, and they became a warning.

cnv.text: 地開了口，把他們和可拉吞了下去；可拉與他的同黨都死了，那時有火吞滅了二百五十個人，他們成了警戒。

ccb.text: 以致大地裂开将他们全部吞了下去，当时大火还烧灭了二百五十人——成了后人的警戒。
